description_long: This storage tank features a robust rectangular base constructed from what appears to be dark, weathered metal or concrete, supporting a large hemispherical dome on top. The dome is light gray with visible dark smudges and stains, suggesting exposure to the elements or industrial use. The front side of the tank has a prominent arched opening in the dome, likely serving as an access point or hatch. The flat top surface of the base is a reddish-brown color, possibly indicating rust or a protective coating. The structure is solid and utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. Its overall design suggests it is intended for secure storage or containment in an urban or industrial environment.
description: A rectangular, dark base supports a large, weathered gray dome with an arched opening on one side. The tank has a utilitarian, industrial appearance with a reddish-brown flat top.
description_view_0: The tank is seen from the side, showing the dome's smooth, stained surface and the rectangular base with no visible openings.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the arched opening in the dome, providing access to the tank's interior.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors view 0, with the dome and base visible but no openings or features.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the dome and the full width of the rectangular base, with no visible openings or attachments.
